title: Architect Log Aggregation & Indexing
description: Compare the architectural patterns of index-heavy (e.g., Elasticsearch) and label-based (e.g., Grafana Loki) log aggregation systems. Evaluate suitable log aggregation solutions for high-ingestion, low-query-frequency workloads. Design a scalable log aggregation strategy that balances storage costs and query performance.
objectives: Compare the architectural patterns of index-heavy (e.g., Elasticsearch) and label-based (e.g., Grafana Loki) log aggregation systems.
Evaluate suitable log aggregation solutions for high-ingestion, low-query-frequency workloads.
Design a scalable log aggregation strategy that balances storage costs and query performance.
